'''Orrh Or'Ur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] who was active during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted dead for leading raids on [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] compound. Gardulla's [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] of 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] was collected by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
